reviews.comment:
This is my go-to for after work wine and appetizers. It has a great atmosphere for meeting up with friends, especially their patio in the summer. They have excellent food that’s great to share. I have liked everything we have ordered.
I’ve never had a bad glass of wine, either recommended by staff or on the small menu. You’re welcome to wander the shelves and pick out whatever you want too.
Service is friendly and they check on you several times throughout your visit. This is a very popular place, so be sure to make a reservation.

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for the kind words, Polly! We’re glad our patio and shareable appetizers hit the spot for your after-work hangouts. It’s awesome to hear you’ve enjoyed both the wine picks and our service. Looking forward to seeing you back soon!

reviews.comment: My husband and I love Whispering Vine. Reservations are easy, service and food is great. They don’t have a mark up on bottles of wine like in other restaurants. reviews.comment: The Whispering Vine is my favorite places to wine shop! The prices are the best in town and the selection is incredible. The knowledge of the staff and their willingness to guide shoppers through their abundant selection makes this a one-of-kind, date night experience. If you haven't been to the Whispering Vine Wine Co., you have been missing out.

reviews.name: accounts/104447125096839272944/locations/13762251274808944694/reviews/AbFvOqmDFlvs4UpsDZz5I3QG-HR6-PfGLeTKKgSiDfwOAz2XdRwf-hkrJRLO6MzNQdIQHMyKTJc8

reviews.comment: Wonderful food, wine, and service

reviews.name: accounts/104447125096839272944/locations/13762251274808944694/reviews/AbFvOqks-qg0XNTThq9rQr-FajfPCHv03w1TiDolz5brNEMHUZjR2-mxyvldGLpR3T4WDJY4Pu_gnw

reviews.comment:
We are always happy when we go to Whispering Vine, and we’re never disappointed. The food, the drinks (obviously), and the staff are consistently excellent.

They have a great selection of unique, flavorful dishes, and the salt and vinegar tater tots are an absolute staple for us every visit. The charcuterie board is our go-to appetizer—it’s loaded with delicious options and always hits the mark.

The staff is incredibly friendly and welcoming, and we really enjoy being able to wander around and choose a bottle (or bottles) of wine to enjoy with dinner. It adds to the overall experience and makes it feel relaxed and personal.

Pricing is very fair for the quality of food, the portion sizes, and the level of service. The wine and alcohol pricing is also very competitive with local shops, and unlike many restaurants, you don’t pay an inflated premium on wine here.

Overall, I highly recommend Whispering Vine. It’s a consistently great experience and one of our favorite spots in town.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Patrick, for the glowing 5-star review! We're thrilled to hear that every visit to Whispering Vine is a delight for you. We take pride in our excellent staff, fair pricing, and our laid-back, personal atmosphere. We can't wait to have you back for your next wine selection and dining experience!

reviews.name: accounts/104447125096839272944/locations/13762251274808944694/reviews/AbFvOqnPRmX7JvaJO0Iaq0XayVI6RDabJRvFduDV_ar3ZAx2G8mlDh_P9jr13Tf-LkjHKTQo9s56iw

reviews.comment:
This place truly offers one of the best wine tasting experiences in town, standing out for both quality and atmosphere. The wine selection is thoughtfully curated, featuring a great variety of flavors and styles that cater to both casual wine drinkers and seasoned enthusiasts. Each pour feels intentional, and the staff is knowledgeable and passionate, making the tasting experience engaging, informative, and enjoyable.
What really elevates the experience is their top-notch charcuterie board. Beautifully presented and perfectly balanced, it features high-quality meats, flavorful cheeses, fresh accompaniments, and just the right touches of sweetness and crunch. Every bite pairs effortlessly with the wines, enhancing the flavors and turning the tasting into a complete culinary experience.
Together, the exceptional wine tasting and outstanding charcuterie create an experience that feels both relaxed and refined. It’s the perfect spot to unwind, socialize, or treat yourself to something special—definitely a must-visit for anyone who appreciates great wine and thoughtfully crafted food. 🍷🧀

reviewReply.comment: Dare, Thank you for taking the time to rate and review our 4th Street location. We look forward to your return for more charcuterie and wine!

reviews.comment: One of my favorite South Reno watering holes! Great place to grab a glass of wine after work or a weekend cocktail outside. The staff is friendly and knowledgeable. reviews.comment:
They were very friendly and helpful. A great place to relax, try some wines and pick something out for a special occasion or just to find something nice for at home 😉

They also have a variety of beers and harder stuff if you're looking for more than wine to enjoy on site or buy.

They have a few snacks on site but also allow food to be brought in to enjoy while you either taste test a sampler or enjoy your full glass of choice.

Also a perfect start to a date night😉

reviews.comment:
I love the selection here. I also love how knowledgeable the staff is. I don't think it's possible to stump them! If you drink at Whispering Vine and don't finish a bottle they'll cork it for to enjoy at home! (I love Nevada) the only thing disappointing here is they're Meat and Cheese plates.  (They have a couple other "Appetizers" I'm gluten free I haven't had them. I digress)
Dry cheese, dry meat, sloppily thrown in a plate. It's quite expensive for what I is. I think it would be easy to make something a bit more presentable, and enjoyable.

reviewReply.comment: Haily, Thank you for taking the time to review us! We are limited on what we can offer at our South store as we do not have a kitchen there.
